# ScanIQ

> ScanIQ is an AI-powered nutrition and calorie tracking app. Scan food with your camera to instantly log calories, macros and health scores, and work toward your weight goals.

ScanIQ uses AI image recognition to analyze meals from a single photo, then logs them into a daily food diary. It also tracks water, weight, workouts and offers AI meal suggestions and recipes. Most of the product is behind sign-in.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview and entry point.
- [Sign in / Sign up](/auth): Create an account or log in.
- [Help & FAQ](/help): Frequently asked questions, support contact, and account tools.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How ScanIQ handles personal data (GDPR).
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Terms governing use of ScanIQ.
